vision: Enable ecommerce brands to test and optimize multiple customer avatars with AI-powered coaching guided by the IDEA framework book
description: Comprehensive multi-avatar management system with book-guided chat workflow, manual field editing, performance tracking, and ROI measurement. Following Trevor's 11-chapter IDEA framework for systematic avatar development.

phases.name: Phase 0: Technical Debt Refactoring
phases.description: Clean technical debt blocking V2 implementation before starting new features

phases.name: Phase 1: Foundation & Infrastructure
phases.description: Database setup, core services, and UI foundation for multi-avatar system

phases.name: Phase 2: Core Multi-Avatar Features
phases.description: Avatar CRUD, switching, field editing, and chat integration

phases.name: Phase 2.5: V2 Chat-First UX Redesign
phases.description: Invert V2 layout to chat-primary (right) + chapter accordion (left). BMAD Trevor persona, chapter-driven coaching, field extraction from AI responses, avatar header dropdown, V1 route migration.

phases.name: Phase 3: Advanced Features
phases.description: Performance tracking, document generation, and polish

phases.name: Phase 4: Testing & QA
phases.description: Comprehensive testing, security audit, and beta preparation

phases.name: Phase 5: Beta Launch
phases.description: Gradual rollout to beta users with monitoring and iteration

features.title: Pre-Implementation Refactoring Sprint
features.description: Refactor critical paths that block V2 implementation, focusing on chat service, field hooks, and component architecture
features.rationale: Technical debt is blocking efficient V2 development and causing maintenance issues
acceptance_criteria: Refactor SupabaseChatService.ts - extract methods, reduce complexity by 30%
Add type safety improvements to usePersistedField hook
Split AIAssistant.tsx into smaller, focused components
Extract shared sync service for field updates

features.title: Test Coverage Enhancement
features.description: Add characterization tests for legacy code and improve coverage on critical paths
features.rationale: Current test coverage insufficient for safe refactoring and feature development
acceptance_criteria: Achieve 70%+ test coverage on critical paths
Add characterization tests for legacy components
Create test fixtures for avatar data

features.title: Multi-Avatar Database Schema
features.description: Create database tables for brands, avatars, and performance metrics with RLS policies
features.rationale: Need persistent storage for multiple avatars per user with proper security
acceptance_criteria: Create brands table with user association
Create avatars table with brand association
Create performance_metrics table for ROI tracking
Additive migrations only - no breaking changes
Create default brand for existing users
Migrate existing chat sessions to first avatar

features.title: Avatar Management Service Layer
features.description: Build service layer for avatar CRUD operations with React Query integration
features.rationale: Centralized avatar management logic with caching and optimistic updates
acceptance_criteria: Implement React Query hooks for avatar operations
Add optimistic updates for UI responsiveness
Implement avatar templates for quick starts

features.title: Two-Panel Responsive UI Foundation
features.description: Adapt UI to two-panel layout (chat + fields) optimized for mobile and desktop
features.rationale: Simplified from three-panel design for better mobile experience and reduced complexity
acceptance_criteria: Implement responsive breakpoints (mobile: stacked, desktop: side-by-side)
Add collapsible field panel for mobile
Set up /v2/* routes with feature flags
Maximum reuse of existing shadcn-ui components

features.title: Feature Flag Configuration
features.description: Configure feature flags for gradual V2 rollout
features.rationale: Enable safe, gradual rollout with instant rollback capability

features.title: Avatar CRUD Operations
features.description: Complete create, read, update, delete functionality for avatars
features.rationale: Core functionality for managing multiple avatars
acceptance_criteria: Create avatar with name and initial fields
Auto-generate unique names if not provided
Support avatar templates (Weekend Warrior, Budget Conscious, etc.)

features.title: Avatar Tab Navigation
features.description: Tab-based UI for switching between avatars seamlessly
features.rationale: Quick access to multiple avatars for comparison and testing
acceptance_criteria: Display avatar tabs (bottom on mobile, top on desktop)
Preserve or reset chat context on switch (user choice)
Lazy load avatar data on switch

features.title: Manual Field Editor with Sync
features.description: Inline field editing with auto-save, validation, and manual edit prioritization
features.rationale: Users need full control over avatar fields with AI assistance
acceptance_criteria: Inline editing for all field types
Visual indicators for manual edits (✏️) vs AI (🤖)
Preserve manual edits when AI suggests updates
Rich text support for long-form fields
Edit history per field per avatar

features.title: Book-Guided Chat Workflow
features.description: Chat system following Trevor's 11-chapter IDEA framework progression
features.rationale: Systematic avatar development using proven IDEA methodology
acceptance_criteria: Provide chapter summaries before each stage
Reference book excerpts via existing RAG (vector store: vs_6948707b318c81918a90e9b44970a99e)

features.title: AI Field Extraction from Chat
features.description: Structured field extraction from Trevor's chat responses using the ---FIELD_EXTRACTION_JSON--- delimiter protocol. The edge function (spec 033) injects extraction instructions per chapter; the useFieldExtraction hook (spec 036) parses, persists, and protects manual edits. Phase 3 adds: confidence scoring, field-update animations, and chat-to-field mapping reference.
features.rationale: Reduce manual data entry — Trevor's structured responses auto-populate the chapter accordion fields while preserving user edits.
acceptance_criteria: Extract field values from Trevor's structured ---FIELD_EXTRACTION_JSON--- delimiter block (implemented in spec 036)
Map extracted values to chapter accordion fields in real time (implemented in spec 036)
Never overwrite manual edits (source='manual' takes priority over source='ai') (implemented in spec 036)
Confidence scoring on extracted fields: high/medium/low shown as indicator (Phase 3 enhancement)
Field highlight animation when AI populates or updates a field (Phase 3 enhancement)
Chat-to-field mapping: user can see which message sourced each field value (Phase 3 enhancement)

features.title: V1 Route Migration
features.description: Move all legacy routes to /v1/* prefix. Add V1_ROUTES constant to routes.ts. Add <Navigate replace> redirects from legacy paths to V1 equivalents. No page component changes — routing only.
features.rationale: V2 users must never encounter V1 pages. Clean URL namespace separation lets V2 own the experience completely.
acceptance_criteria: All other legacy paths redirect to /v1/* equivalents
All V1 pages still render at their /v1/* paths

features.title: BMAD Coach Agent — Trevor Persona
features.description: Create src/agents/trevor-brand-coach.md with full Trevor BMAD persona spec. Extend edge function to embed Trevor persona as base system prompt and inject chapter-specific field extraction instructions when chapterContext is present in request body.
features.rationale: Trevor needs a formal BMAD agent definition to ensure consistent voice, chapter-by-chapter workflow, and structured field extraction. The edge function must support the extraction protocol.
acceptance_criteria: src/agents/trevor-brand-coach.md created with persona, 11-chapter workflow, checkpoint protocol
Edge function reads optional chapterContext from request body
When chapterContext present, extraction instructions appended to system prompt
Trevor persona replaces generic IDEA GPT system prompt
All existing behavior preserved (System KB, User KB, OpenAI call)
Trevor introduces himself by name in first message of a session

features.title: Chapter Section Accordion
features.description: Create ChapterSectionAccordion, ChapterFieldSet, and CHAPTER_FIELDS_MAP for the V2 left panel. Shows all 11 chapters with active chapter open + fields, completed chapters collapsed with summary, future chapters locked.
features.rationale: The V2 left panel replaces the static brand form with a dynamic, chapter-driven accordion that shows coach-managed fields for user review and editing.
acceptance_criteria: src/config/chapterFields.ts created with CHAPTER_FIELDS_MAP for all 11 chapters
Active chapter auto-expanded; future chapters disabled
Completed chapters show first captured value as summary
Proceed to Next Section button calls onProceed(chapterId)
Field source indicators: Bot icon for AI, Pencil icon for manual
Uses existing accordion.tsx, badge.tsx, button.tsx, textarea.tsx, input.tsx, label.tsx

features.title: Avatar Header Dropdown
features.description: Create AvatarHeaderDropdown component for V2 header. Shows current avatar name, dropdown to switch avatars, create new avatar option with dialog.
features.rationale: V2 has no sidebar so avatar switching lives in the header. Dropdown pattern gives quick access without consuming panel space.
acceptance_criteria: Uses useBrand() for currentAvatarId, avatarsList, switchAvatar, createAvatar, isLoadingAvatars
Dropdown lists all avatars with checkmark on active + completion percentage
Create New Avatar option opens Dialog with name input
Loading state shows spinner in trigger
Uses existing dropdown-menu.tsx, dialog.tsx, button.tsx, input.tsx

features.title: Field Extraction Hook
features.description: Create useFieldExtraction hook that parses ---FIELD_EXTRACTION_JSON--- delimiter from AI responses, strips it from display text, saves field values with source tracking, and persists to localStorage with avatar-scoped keys.
features.rationale: Bridges the edge function's structured extraction output with the frontend accordion. Manual edits always win over AI extractions.
acceptance_criteria: extractFields(rawResponse) strips block and returns clean display text
Valid extraction block → field values saved with source='ai'
setFieldManual sets source='manual' and blocks AI overwrites for that field
Malformed JSON → logs error, returns full original response
clearFields() resets all values and sources
Unit tests cover: delimiter parsing, manual override, malformed JSON, clearFields

features.title: V2 Layout Rework — BrandCoachV2
features.description: Full rework of BrandCoachV2.tsx: chat moves to RIGHT, ChapterSectionAccordion in LEFT, AvatarHeaderDropdown in header, field extraction wired end-to-end, handleProceed advances chapters and sends Trevor transition messages, chapterContext included in sendMessage metadata.
features.rationale: Integrates all Phase 2.5 components into a cohesive chat-first experience. This is the final assembly step.
acceptance_criteria: Chat interface on RIGHT panel (moved from left)
AvatarHeaderDropdown + chapter progress badge in header
useFieldExtraction intercepts AI responses, strips extraction block before display
sendMessage includes chapterContext metadata for current chapter
handleProceed: completeCurrentChapter() + Trevor chapter-transition system message
System messages (isSystemMessage=true) filtered from chat display
All existing chat features preserved (session sidebar, copy, download, clear)
Verify whether useChat returns raw or stored content (critical investigation before build)

features.title: V2 Field Population Integration
features.description: Wire extracted fields from ChatFieldExtractionService into BrandCoachV2 component to populate chapter fields. Implement field accumulator for batch updates at chapter completion, connect useChat response to field extraction flow, and enable progressive field population as users converse with Trevor.
features.rationale: Field extraction at the source is complete (ChatFieldExtractionService intercepts raw responses). Now need to connect this data flow to the UI components so fields actually populate in the chapter accordion as users progress through conversations.
acceptance_criteria: useChat hook exposes extractedFields from ChatResponse
BrandCoachV2 monitors chat responses for extracted fields
useFieldAccumulator hook accumulates fields during chapter conversation
Accumulated fields NOT immediately applied (batch at chapter end)
Visual indicator shows when fields are pending/accumulating
handleProceed applies accumulated fields via batch update
Field sources tracked (AI vs manual) to prevent overwrites
Manual edits block AI updates for that specific field
Chapter completion clears accumulator for next chapter
Field values persist in localStorage with avatar scope
Switching avatars clears/loads appropriate field set
Field extraction works with Trevor's BMAD chapter prompts
Integration test confirms end-to-end field population flow
user_stories: As a user, I want my chat responses to automatically populate the chapter fields so I don't have to manually copy information
As a user, I want to review extracted fields before they're applied so I maintain control over my brand data
As a user, I want manual edits to be preserved even if the AI suggests different values
As a user, I want field values to accumulate during a chapter conversation and apply all at once when I proceed

features.title: Performance Metrics Tracking
features.description: Manual entry and tracking of avatar performance metrics by channel
features.rationale: Measure ROI and identify winning avatars based on real campaign data
acceptance_criteria: Manual metric entry forms per avatar
Support standard metrics (CTR, CPA, ROAS, Conversion Rate)
Track by deployment channel (Facebook, Email, TikTok)

features.title: ROI Calculation & Reporting
features.description: Calculate and visualize return on investment for each avatar
features.rationale: Prove value of avatar testing with concrete ROI data

features.title: Strategy Document Generation
features.description: Generate comprehensive brand strategy documents per avatar
features.rationale: Provide actionable deliverables for implementation
acceptance_criteria: Generate strategy doc with all 11 book chapters
Include relevant book excerpts and frameworks
Prioritize manually edited fields in output
Include brand assets and uploaded documents

features.title: Avatar Comparison View
features.description: Side-by-side comparison of multiple avatars
features.rationale: Enable quick identification of differences and optimization opportunities

features.title: Mobile Experience Optimization
features.description: Optimize UI/UX specifically for mobile devices
features.rationale: Majority of users will access via mobile (Trevor's audience)

features.title: Comprehensive Test Suite
features.description: Unit, integration, and E2E tests for all features
features.rationale: Ensure quality and prevent regressions
acceptance_criteria: E2E tests for avatar creation journey

features.title: Security Audit & Hardening
features.description: Comprehensive security review and fixes
features.rationale: Protect user data and maintain trust

features.title: Performance Testing & Optimization
features.description: Load testing and performance optimization
features.rationale: Ensure scalability and responsiveness

features.title: User Documentation & Help
features.description: Complete documentation for users and developers
features.rationale: Reduce support burden and enable self-service

features.title: Beta Launch Preparation
features.description: Prepare infrastructure and processes for beta
features.rationale: Ensure smooth beta launch with proper monitoring

features.title: Gradual Beta Rollout
features.description: Phased rollout to beta users
features.rationale: Validate with real users before full launch

features.title: Production Monitoring
features.description: Set up comprehensive monitoring and alerting
features.rationale: Proactive issue detection and resolution

features.title: ROI Testimonial Collection
features.description: Gather and document success stories from beta users
features.rationale: Social proof critical for adoption

features.title: Beta Feedback Iteration
features.description: Priority fixes based on beta user feedback
features.rationale: Polish before general availability
acceptance_criteria: UI/UX improvements based on usage data

user_adoption.mitigation: Gradual rollout with fallback to V1
